products.title: Adidas Adizero Evo SL Black
products.description: Experience the feeling of fast in the Adizero Evo SL. Inspired by the innovation of record-breaking shoes in the Adizero running family - and specifically the Pro Evo 1 - the Evo SL is designed for you to run in it, or not. Combining Adizero technology with a bold and unique racing-inspired aesthetic, it's an evolution of speed in all aspects of life. A responsive layer of LIGHTSTRIKE PRO foam in the midsole provides comfort and cushioning for optimal energy return.

products.title: adidas Samba OG 'Tweed Pack - Dark Brown'
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) The adidas Samba OG Dark Brown Tweed is an athletic shoe featuring a herringbone Brown Tweed fabric upper, contrasted by the 3-Stripes in Cream White. The heel tab coordinates with the branding, while the lace panel in Dark Brown matches the Tweed upper. The Trefoil logo appears on the tongue, and a textured Gum sole pulls it all together. The German athletic wear monolith adidas has produced its iconic Samba style since 1949, when founder Adolf Dassler designed it. A well-recognized and classic staple of the adidas footwear roster, the Samba’s signature Gum sole coordinates well with this limited edition menswear-inspired rendition.

products.title: Adidas Samba OG Wales Bonner
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) Launching as part of the 'Cheetah Pack,' the adidas Women's Samba OG 'Preloved Red' gives the classic indoor soccer shoe an exotic makeover. Dressed entirely in faux brown pony hair, the upper features black cheetah spots with contrasting off-white leather accents on the serrated three-stripes and black tab. The low-profile silhouette is secured with brick red laces, matching the synthetic leather lining. Anchoring the sneaker is a durable gum rubber sole unit.
